hero.title: ProLEDALL Partner Program
hero.description: Join our global network of partners and access exclusive benefits, support, and business opportunities.
hero.tagline: Save time, eliminate risks, scale projects.

valueBlocks.title: Why partner with ProLEDALL?
valueBlocks.subtitle: ProLEDALL provides you with high-quality products, professional support, and powerful resources to help you grow your business.

blocks.title: High-quality products
blocks.description: Reliable, certified, and innovative LED display solutions.

blocks.title: Competitive advantages
blocks.description: Competitive pricing and flexible partnership policies.

blocks.title: Professional support
blocks.description: Dedicated technical and sales support throughout your projects.

blocks.title: Global opportunities
blocks.description: Expand your business with access to international markets.

opportunities.title: Partner opportunities
opportunities.subtitle: We are looking for motivated partners to grow with us in global markets.

cards.title: Distributors
cards.description: Distribute PROLEDALL products in your local market and grow your business.

cards.title: Resellers
cards.description: Resell our high-quality LED displays and solutions to your customers.

cards.title: System integrators
cards.description: Integrate PROLEDALL products into your solutions and projects seamlessly.

cards.title: Project contractors
cards.description: Work on LED display projects and deliver outstanding results together.

cards.title: Retailers
cards.description: Sell PROLEDALL products through your retail channels and stores.

howTo.title: How to become a partner
howTo.subtitle: It's easy to join our partner network and start growing together.
howTo.ctaTitle: Ready to join our partner network?
howTo.ctaSubtitle: Submit your application today and take the first step towards a successful partnership.

steps.title: Submit application
steps.description: Fill out the partner application form with your company information.

steps.title: Review & approval
steps.description: Our team will review your application and get back to you.

steps.title: Partnership agreement
steps.description: Once approved, we'll set up our partnership terms and agreement.

steps.title: Grow together
steps.description: Access partner resources and start your journey with PROLEDALL.
